data.title: GREEN: Update sprint SKILL.md Phase 1 to use --has-tag=brainstorm:complete
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Exemption
Rule 5 of the behavioral testing standard (non-executable LLM instruction file): sprint SKILL.md is not executed directly; behavioral correctness of LLM agent response is non-deterministic. Task 1 provides structural boundary tests that validate this task's deliverable (presence of --has-tag=brainstorm:complete, /dso:brainstorm in note).

## Implementation
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md Phase 1 "If No Primary Ticket ID Provided" section:

1. Line ~86: Replace:
   `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --all --min-children=1`
   With:
   `.claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --all --has-tag=brainstorm:complete`

2. Line ~99: Replace the second invocation:
   `...same command without --min-children=1...`
   With:
   `...same command without --has-tag=brainstorm:complete...`
   (Keep semantics: unfiltered run counts total epics for hidden_count computation)

3. Line ~107: Replace the "no eligible epics" note about "0 children":
   Old: "There are N epics with no children yet. Run /dso:brainstorm on one to decompose it into stories before executing."
   New: "There are N epics without the brainstorm:complete tag. Run /dso:brainstorm on one to complete scrutiny review before executing."

4. Line ~126: Replace the hidden-epics note:
   Old: "(N epics with zero children are hidden. Run /dso:brainstorm on one to create stories.)"
   New: "(N epics without brainstorm:complete tag are hidden. Run /dso:brainstorm on one to complete scrutiny review before executing.)"

Preplanning Gate (later in Phase 1): leave untouched — gate logic is unchanged.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_sprint_uses_has_tag_filter passes (GREEN after this task)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-sprint-epic-selection-display.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_hidden_epics_note_references_brainstorm passes
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-sprint-epic-selection-display.sh
- [ ] '--has-tag=brainstorm:complete' appears in sprint SKILL.md Phase 1 filter invocation
  Verify: grep -q -- '--has-tag=brainstorm:complete' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] '/dso:brainstorm' appears in the hidden-epics note section
  Verify: grep -q '/dso:brainstorm' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] '--min-children=1' does NOT appear in the filter invocation context
  Verify: structural test confirms absence
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
